'''mangolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynastid|dynastid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynastid|dynastid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mangolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængeleth|mængeleth]] || [[word:mængelej|mængelej]] || [[word:mængelesh|mængelesh]] || [[word:mængele|mængele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangongoloth|mangongoloth]] || [[word:mangongoloj|mangongoloj]] || [[word:mangongolosh|mangongolosh]] || [[word:mangongolo|mangongolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangoloth|mangoloth]] || [[word:mangoloj|mangoloj]] || [[word:mangolosh|mangolosh]] || [[word:mangolo|mangolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangofloth|mangofloth]] || [[word:mangofloj|mangofloj]] || [[word:mangoflosh|mangoflosh]] || [[word:mangoflof|mangoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangolotho|mangolotho]] || [[word:mangolojo|mangolojo]] || [[word:mangolosho|mangolosho]] || [[word:mangoloko|mangoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangoloth|mangoloth]] || [[word:mangoloj|mangoloj]] || [[word:mangolosh|mangolosh]] || [[word:mangolo|mangolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangolothol|mangolothol]] || [[word:mangolojol|mangolojol]] || [[word:mangoloshol|mangoloshol]] || [[word:mangolokol|mangolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangolothotho|mangolothotho]] || [[word:mangolojojo|mangolojojo]] || [[word:mangoloshosho|mangoloshosho]] || [[word:mangoloko|mangoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangolothon|mangolothon]] || [[word:mangolojon|mangolojon]] || [[word:mangoloshon|mangoloshon]] || [[word:mangolokon|mangolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangolothoro|mangolothoro]] || [[word:mangolojoro|mangolojoro]] || [[word:mangoloshoro|mangoloshoro]] || [[word:mangolokoro|mangolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
